PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-26-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Christopher Tang (pro per) appearing via zoom (petitioner).

Mr. Tang stated that he understood the duties and liabilities of being an administrator, that he is receiving assistance with the process. Petition for letters of administration is taken under submission with the intent to approve.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wan. Not reported.
